add_member_desc: Enter the email of the person you want to give an account to and pick a role. The system generates a link for you to send them.
agent_welcome_message:
Hello, I am your Social Hub agent 🙌🏻.

I can schedule a post or multiple posts to multiple channels and generate pictures.

You can select the channels you want to use from the left menu.

You can see your previous conversations from the right menu.

You can also use me as an MCP Server, check Settings >> Public API
ai_credits_desc: Track the credits/balance of external AI tools and get alerts when they run low. HeyGen fetches its balance automatically via API; Claude, OpenAI and Google AI Studio have no balance API, so they are entered manually.
analytics_ai_analysis_note: — what wins for this channel, and what to post next
analytics_ai_empty: Not enough posts yet to analyze — post a bit more, then check back.
analytics_ai_thinking: AI is reading this channel’s posts…
analytics_ask_placeholder: Ask anything about this channel’s performance…
analytics_chat_greeting: Hi! Ask me anything about this channel — I read its real numbers and posts. I can even draft a post for you.
analytics_insights_note: Note: overview charts need the read_insights permission from Meta (App Review). The "Top posts of this channel" section below still works without it.
analytics_no_overview: No overview data to show right now
analytics_no_overview_hint: This is usually a temporary hiccup or a cached page. Click "Try again" first. If it keeps happening, use "Refresh Channel" to reconnect.
analytics_open_post: Open this post on Facebook (new tab)
analytics_q1: Which post performed best and why?
analytics_q2: Write a post like my top one
analytics_q3: What should I post this week?
analytics_refresh_confirm: Refreshing reconnects this channel. You will leave Analytics and be sent to the provider to sign in again. Continue?
analytics_top_posts_empty: No posts found in this period — try a longer date range.
analytics_top_posts_note: — every post on the page (including ones posted outside the Hub), ranked by engagement
anthropic_description: Used for AI writing and Agent features. Get one at console.anthropic.com.
anthropic_server_unreachable: Could not reach server to check

autopost_can_automatically_posts_your_rs: Autopost can automatically posts your RSS new items to social media

check_n8n: Check out our N8N custom node for Social Hub.
choose_set_or_continue: Choose a set or continue without one
choose_upload_without_posting_descriptio: Choose upload without posting if you want to review and edit your content within TikTok's app before publishing. This gives you access to TikTok's built-in editing tools and lets you make final adjustments before posting.
click_channel_to_add: Click a channel to add it
click_here_to_go_back_to_login: Click here to go back to login
click_multiple_pages: Click to select multiple channels at once

click_the_button_below_to_upload_other: Click the button below to upload multiple
click_to_exit_global_editing: Click this button to exit global editing and customize the post for this channel
company_voice_we_are_happy_to_announce: Company voice ("We are happy to announce")
confirm_delete_tool: Remove this tool from the dashboard?
confirm_remove_member: Remove this member from the organization?

connect_your_accounts: Connect your social accounts to start scheduling, publishing, and analyzing — all in one place.
connect_your_github_repository_to_receiv: Connect your GitHub repository to receive updates and analytics
connect_your_mcp_client_to_postiz_to_sch: Connect Social Hub MCP server to your client (Http streaming) to schedule your posts faster!

delete_posts_before_channel: You have to delete all the posts associated with this channel before deleting it
drag_n_drop_some_files_here: Drag n drop some files here
drop_files_here_to_upload: Drop your files here to upload
email_changed: Email changed — use the new email to sign in
faq_am_i_going_to_be_charged_by_postiz: Am I going to be charged by Social Hub?
faq_if_you_have_a_team_with_multiple_mem: If you have a team with multiple members, you can invite them to your workspace to collaborate on your posts and add their personal channels
faq_postiz_gitroom_allows_you_to_schedul:
Social Hub allows you to schedule your posts between different channels.
A channel is a publishing platform where you can schedule your posts.
For example, you can schedule your posts on X, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Reddit, Linkedin, Dribbble, Threads and Pinterest.
faq_postiz_gitroom_is_proudly_open_sourc: Social Hub is proudly open-source! We believe in an ethical and transparent culture, meaning that Social Hub will live forever. You can check out the entire code or use it for personal projects. To view the open-source repository, click here.
faq_to_confirm_credit_card_information_p: To confirm credit card information Social Hub will hold $2 and release it immediately, you can cancel your subscription anytime from settings without talking to a person
faq_we_automate_chatgpt_to_help_you_writ: We automate ChatGPT to help you write social posts and articles.
filerobot_blank_hint: Upload an image above, or start typing or drawing right on the blank canvas
filerobot_hint: Upload an image to edit, or design directly on a blank canvas
finding_popular_posts_to_match_with: Finding popular posts to match with...
footer_desc: Fixed content (hotline, address, branch info…) is automatically inserted below the caption and above the hashtags every time you post to this channel. Leave empty = nothing inserted.
forgot_password_contact_admin: Forgot your password? Contact an administrator to have it reset.
go_to_the_calendar_to_add_channels: Go to the calendar to add channels
image_gen_description: Used for the "Generate AI Image" button when composing (Claude does not generate images, so a separate provider is needed).
image_gen_failed: Could not generate the image, please try again later.
image_gen_fal_hint: Get your key at fal.ai/dashboard/keys. Cheaper, with more image models.
image_gen_no_key: No key yet — the image button will prompt for configuration.
image_gen_not_configured: Could not generate the image. Go to Settings → "AI Image Generation" to add a key.
image_gen_openai_hint: Get your key at platform.openai.com. Billed per image.
image_gen_save_failed: Could not save (system admin permission required).
invite_hint: You have been invited to Social Hub. Set a password to get started.
invite_note: The recipient opens the link → sets a password → gets in right away with the chosen role. (The link has been copied to your clipboard.)
invite_your_assistant_or_team_member_to_: Invite your assistant or team member to manage your account

login_provisioned_note: Accounts are provisioned by an administrator — contact the marketing team if you don’t have one.
magic_caption_done: Wrote the post caption + captions for ${(data.images || []).filter((i: any) => i?.caption).length} images (click each image to view/edit).
magic_caption_error: Error calling AI — please try again.
magic_caption_failed: Could not write caption — check your Claude key in Settings and try again.
magic_caption_tooltip: AI reads your images & writes captions (post + each image)
magic_caption_tooltip_empty: Add images first — AI will read them and write captions
manual_balance_hint: No balance API — enter the remaining balance manually.
move_to_the_seller_page_to_connect_you_b: Move to the seller page to connect you bank

select_channels_from_circles: Select channels from the circles above

start_writing_your_post: Start writing your post for a preview
team_desc_admin: Only admins can create accounts and invite others. Create a link → send it to them → they set a password and get in right away.
team_desc_user: List of members in the organization. Only admins can create or remove accounts.

there_are_not_plugs_matching_your_channe: There are not plugs matching your channels
this_cannot_be_changed_once_posted: This cannot be changed once your video is posted.
this_channel_needs_to_be_refreshed: This channel needs to be refreshed,
this_feature_available_only_for_photos: This feature available only for photos, it will add a default music that you can change later.
this_video_will_be_classified_brand_orga: This video will be classified as Brand Organic.
this_video_will_be_classified_branded_co: This video will be classified as Branded Content.
threshold_placeholder: e.g. 10 — leave empty to disable alerts
title: Title
to_manage_all_your_social_media_channels: To Manage All Your Social Media Channels
to_sell_posts_you_would_have_to: To sell posts you would have to:
to_your_telegram_group_channel_and_click:
to your
 telegram group / channel and click here:
tour_agents_desc: AI assistants that write captions and generate content on demand.
tour_analytics_desc: Channel numbers in one place: views, engagement and growth.
tour_calendar_desc: See every post on a calendar, drag to reschedule, and click an empty slot to create a post for many channels at once.
tour_done_desc: Start by creating your first post on the Calendar. Happy posting!
tour_media_desc: A shared library of photos & videos used across all posts.
tour_settings_desc: Change your display name and password. Admins manage members and create accounts here.
tour_viral_desc: Capture viral education posts, dissect their formula and clone them into Việt Anh branded posts. Main metric: shares.
tour_welcome_desc: Việt Anh School's social media hub: schedule posts to every channel, pull photos from Zalo groups and clone viral education posts. Press "Next" for a quick walkthrough.
tour_zalo_desc: The Zalo bot collects photos and posts from the school Zalo groups — pick the good ones and push them straight into the media library.
turn_on_to_disclose_video_promotes: Turn on to disclose that this video promotes goods or services in exchange for something of value. You video could promote yourself, a third party, or both.
upgrade_required: You need to upgrade to use this feature
upload_content_to_tiktok_without_posting: Upload content to TikTok without posting it
use_postiz_api_to_integrate_with_your_to: Use Social Hub API to integrate with your tools.
video_length_is_invalid_must_be_up_to: Video length is invalid, must be up to
viral_archive_note: Skipped + deleted posts. Everything here is auto-deleted after 7 days.
viral_capture_failed: Could not capture the post, try again.
viral_capture_hint: AI reads the content, fills in the metrics and classifies the school level. Screenshots that already show share counts are read automatically.
viral_capture_need_input: Enter a link, text, or pick an image first.
viral_capture_success: Post captured — AI has classified it.
viral_clone_failed: Could not generate the post, try again.
viral_clone_success: Draft generated — added to the approval queue on the Calendar.
viral_clone_to_mine_success: Creating your post — check the "My posts" tab in a few minutes.
viral_cloning_n_suffix: posts of yours — check the "My posts" tab in a few minutes.
viral_config_hint: Auto-crawling sources: RSS news/blogs and looking up share counts via Facebook is FREE. YouTube needs a Google key (free). Crawling shares on FB/IG/TikTok needs an Apify token (paid, free tier $5/month).
viral_draft_note: The generated post is a draft — added to the approval queue on the Calendar, not published automatically.
viral_empty_desc: Paste a link/image/text of a post being heavily shared, or add an RSS source and click "Crawl now". AI will classify it and dissect the formula.
viral_generate_va_post: Generate a Việt Anh post from the formula
viral_hard_delete_one_confirm: Permanently delete this post from the database?
viral_help_apify: URL = page/channel link. Requires an Apify token (paid) in Settings to crawl.
viral_help_news: URL = RSS feed link of the news site/blog (e.g. .../rss). Crawling is FREE, no key needed.
viral_help_youtube: Name = search keyword. Requires a YouTube key (free) in Settings.
viral_link_placeholder: Paste post link (Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, news…)
viral_make_mine_note: AI rewrites this into a better, higher-scoring post that lands in the "My posts" tab — post it to the Calendar from there.
viral_mine_empty_desc: In "To review" or "Approved", select posts and press "Clone → My posts". AI rewrites each into a better, higher-scoring post that lands here — ready to post.
viral_no_match_desc: Nothing in this tab matches the current platform / school-level filters. Clear the filters to see everything again.
viral_no_new_posts: No new posts yet (or no source/token configured).
viral_no_sources: No sources yet — add a source below first.
viral_pick_images: Choose screenshots of the viral post
viral_post_mine_hint: Pick a channel — the content becomes a draft on the Calendar for review, not published right away.
viral_posted_toast: Added as a draft on the Calendar — review & schedule there.
viral_purge_all_confirm: Permanently delete the ENTIRE archive from the database?
viral_scanned_no_new_suffix: sources — no new posts (all already captured).
viral_scoring_bg: AI is scoring them in the background — scores appear in a few minutes.
viral_social_link_warning: FB/IG/TikTok often block bots — the result may miss the image or numbers. Most reliable: use the Screenshot tab (AI reads likes/shares straight from the image).
viral_help_gnews: Keyword = topic (e.g. "raising kids"). AI expands it into 6-7 related queries, then crawls Google News (last 7 days) — FREE, no key needed.
viral_report_zalo: Zalo group receiving weekly brief (via the Zalo bot)
viral_report_zalo_boterr: Could not load groups from the bot — check the Zalo page (bot connected?).
viral_report_test_hint: Send the weekly brief right now to test channels
viral_report_test_ok: Test brief sent — check the bell, email and Zalo group (save config first).
viral_tab_reports_hint: Weekly briefs: hot news, market moves, to-do list — also sent to Zalo/email
viral_flow_reports: Outside the flow · Weekly briefs the AI compiles from 7 days of crawling: hot news, market moves and a to-do list. Auto-created on the Mon-Wed-Fri schedule + Sunday recap, also sent to Zalo/email — tick off to-dos right here.
viral_report_made: Brief created — also sent to your channels.
viral_reports_empty_desc: Briefs are auto-created on the Mon-Wed-Fri crawl schedule and Sunday recap — or press "⚡ Create brief now".
media_frame_hint: Post preview — drag tiles to reorder
select_customer_or_page_tooltip: Select customer or a single page
streak_tip_dead: Your streak is out — come back today to relight it!
viral_tab_skills_hint: Edit the AI recipes: blog/podcast/infographic formulas, scoring rubric, rewrite rules…
viral_flow_skills: Outside the flow · The AI recipes behind every step: writing formulas, scoring rubric, group routing, weekly brief… Edit as markdown, import a .md file, or reset to the built-in default — changes apply from the very next AI run.
viral_skill_saved: Skill saved — AI uses it from the next run.
viral_skill_reset_confirm: Reset this skill to the built-in default?
viral_skill_imported: File loaded into the editor — press Save to apply.
viral_personas_hint: The 8 parent personas AI uses to score & rewrite posts. The dynamic parts (interests, psychology, behaviour, insights) auto-enrich after each crawl from real signals (parent groups, news, winning posts).
viral_flow_pending: Step 1 · AI crawled & scored these posts. ✓ Approve → moves to "Approved" · ✕ Skip → goes to Archive (auto-deleted after 7 days). Posts scoring ≥90 are auto-approved.
viral_flow_approved: Step 2 · Posts you approved. Select cards → "⧉ Clone" (AI rewrites them into social posts) or "🏭 Produce" (into blog/infographic/podcast) — both land in "Ready to post".
viral_flow_ready: Step 3 · Everything finished, waiting to publish. ✍️ Social posts → 📤 push to the Calendar (Facebook…). 🏭 Blog/infographic/podcast → download & publish to the website / YouTube / fanpage.
viral_flow_archive: Outside the flow · Skipped + deleted posts rest here. Everything is permanently deleted after 7 days. You can still ↩ Restore a post back to "To review".
viral_ready_empty_desc: Go to "Approved", select posts, then "🏭 Produce" (blog/infographic/podcast) or "⧉ Clone" (social post). Finished items land here, ready to publish.
viral_ready_products_head: Products — download & publish to website / YouTube / fanpage
viral_ready_social_head: Social posts — push to the Calendar (Facebook…)
viral_cloning_n_suffix: social posts — check the "Ready to post" tab in a few minutes.
viral_clone_to_mine_success: Creating your social post — check the "Ready to post" tab in a few minutes.
viral_produce_hint_suffix: post(s) will be produced in the background, one product per format.
viral_produce_blog_desc: SEO article for the website (EEAT structure) — download as .docx
viral_produce_info_desc: AI-designed image (Gemini) — saved to Media library
viral_produce_pod_desc: Script + Vietnamese TTS voice (MiniMax) — mp3 audio
viral_minimax_missing: MiniMax key not set — add it in Settings or this format will fail.
viral_bgm_mix: Mix background music (intro 6s · outro 8s · auto-duck under voice)
viral_produce_queued_suffix: items — see the "Products" tab, results appear in a few minutes.
viral_products_empty_desc: Select approved posts (or use "My posts") and press "🏭 Produce" — AI turns each into a blog, infographic, or podcast that lands here.
viral_minimax_label: MiniMax TTS key — for podcast production
viral_import_sources_hint: KOLs, competitor schools, parent groups (needs Apify) + 10 Google News keywords (free)
viral_imported_sources_suffix: sources. FB/TikTok stay OFF until you add an Apify token; Google News keywords are AUTO right away.
viral_subtitle_prefix: Capture viral education posts, dissect the formula and clone them into Việt Anh posts. Main metric:
viral_text_placeholder: Paste the post content (include share/like counts if available)
viral_toggle_auto: Toggle scheduled auto-crawl for this source
viral_tracked_sources_note: — the system auto-crawls new posts on a schedule
watch_tutorial_description: Watch this short video to learn how to get the most out of Social Hub
watch_tutorial_title: Learn How to Use Social Hub

you_can_drag_drop_pictures: You can also drag & drop pictures.

zalo_add_group_to_listen: Add a group to listen to:
zalo_ai_rewrote: AI rewrote it — review and click "Save caption" if you like it
zalo_auto_bridge_hint: New images from listened groups → posts awaiting review on Calendar.
zalo_blocker_no_key: the Media Hub API key is not saved
zalo_blocker_toggle_off: the automatic bridge is turned off
zalo_bot_not_running: The Zalo bot is not running
zalo_bot_not_running_hint_1: The bot listens for images from Zalo groups — normally it starts together with
zalo_bot_paused_toast: Bot PAUSED (no new images will be collected)
zalo_bot_queue_hint: Posts the bot has finished processing, awaiting your decision: push to Media Hub to review on Calendar, publish straight to Facebook, or discard.
zalo_bridge_config_saved: Zalo → Media Hub bridge settings saved
zalo_channel_select_title: The Media Hub channel that receives this group's posts
zalo_closing_session: Closing the collection session for "{{name}}" — processing now
zalo_connect_hint_1: Paste the Media Hub API key (
zalo_connect_hint_2: ). The publishing channel is chosen per group below.
zalo_draft_created: Draft created — see the queue below
zalo_enable_bridge_hint: Turn on the bridge above to push to Media Hub.
zalo_fb_gbp_tokens_caption: (opens the bot dashboard in a new tab)
zalo_fb_gbp_tokens_title: Opens the bot dashboard in a new tab to manage Facebook / Google Business tokens.
zalo_fb_publish_confirm: Publish this post PUBLICLY to Facebook now?
zalo_generating_qr: Generating a new QR code — please wait a few seconds…
zalo_group_uses_own_channel: Group "{{name}}" will publish to the selected channel
zalo_in_media_hub: In Media Hub — review on Calendar
zalo_logged_out: Logged out — scan the new QR code above to log in again
zalo_login_first: Log in to Zalo (scan the QR above), then come back here to choose groups to listen to.
zalo_logout_confirm: Log out of the current Zalo account? The bot will show a new QR code to scan another account.
zalo_logout_switch_title: Fully logs out the current Zalo account, then shows a QR code to log in with another account.
zalo_no_groups_yet: No groups found yet. Send any message into a Zalo group so the bot can see it, then click "Refresh".
zalo_groups_loading: Loading the Zalo group list — the first time can take 10–30 seconds…
zalo_no_matching_groups: No more groups match your search.
zalo_no_qr: No QR code yet — click "Generate new QR"
zalo_page_subtitle: Turn images posted in your Zalo groups into draft posts awaiting review on the Calendar.
zalo_pending_banner: posts from the Zalo group are awaiting approval — click a post with the amber border on the calendar to edit & schedule it.
zalo_pending_tooltip: Post from Zalo group — waiting for your approval: click the post to edit & schedule
zalo_pushed_opening: Pushed to Media Hub — opening the composer…
zalo_open_calendar_hint: Open this post's draft in the Calendar composer (review, edit & publish there)
zalo_posts_history_hint: Every post collected from a Zalo group AUTOMATICALLY becomes a draft in the Calendar — review, edit and publish there. This list is just the history.
zalo_history_banner: {{n}} posts collected from Zalo groups — each is already a draft in the Calendar
zalo_media_missing: This file is no longer on the bot — it may have been cleaned up after posting or rejecting.
zalo_reject_confirm: Discard this post? Its images will be deleted from the bot.
zalo_removed_from_queue: Removed the post from the queue
zalo_scan_qr_hint: Open Zalo on your phone → the QR icon → scan the code beside it.
zalo_scan_qr_title: Scan the QR code to log in to Zalo
zalo_unrouted_warn_2: listened groups without a publishing channel selected — their images will not be pushed anywhere. Pick a channel in the box on the right of each group.
zalo_draft_created_tab: Draft created — see the Posts tab
zalo_overview_more_settings: Account, Claude key, group filter… → Settings tab
zalo_posts_bulk_reject_confirm: Discard {{n}} selected posts? Their images will be deleted from the bot.
zalo_posts_bulk_public_confirm: Publish {{n}} selected posts PUBLICLY to Facebook?
zalo_posts_bulk_draft_confirm: Save {{n}} selected posts as Facebook drafts?
zalo_posts_edit_posted_prompt: Edit the caption of the published Facebook post:
zalo_posts_time_future: The scheduled time must be in the future
zalo_posts_now_public: The draft is now PUBLIC on Facebook
zalo_posts_fb_delete_pub_confirm: Delete this PUBLISHED post from Facebook? This cannot be undone.
zalo_posts_fb_was_skipped: Facebook was skipped for this post.
zalo_posts_gbp_removed: Google Business removed from this post
zalo_posts_gbp_removed_list: Google Business removed from the list
zalo_posts_footer_title: Apply the latest footer/contact block from Groups → Pages
zalo_posts_footer_posted_title: Updates the saved copy only — the Facebook post is not modified
zalo_posts_redrafted: New draft created — check "Needs action" to approve
zalo_posts_redraft_confirm: Create a NEW draft from this post (with the latest footer) to approve & publish again?
zalo_posts_remove_confirm: Remove this post from the list? Posts on Facebook/Google are NOT affected.
zalo_posts_edit_imgs_hint: Images — use ↑↓ to reorder (top-down = posting order), ✕ to remove, or add new images.
zalo_posts_folder_title: Filter posts by the person/section in charge
zalo_posts_none: No posts yet. When someone sends images into a listened Zalo group, drafts will appear here.
zalo_routes_missing_thread: Route {{n}} ({{name}}) has no Zalo group selected
zalo_routes_page_no_token: Page "{{name}}" has no token yet — grant it in the Facebook Tokens tab first.
zalo_routes_maxwait_lt: Route {{n}}: "Max per session" must be ≥ "Close after silence".
zalo_routes_saved_footer: Saved — footer refreshed on {{n}} pending posts
zalo_routes_delete_confirm: Delete "{{name}}" from the configuration? Published posts are not affected.
zalo_routes_intro: Each row connects a source Zalo group to where its posts go: a Facebook Page, Google Business, and/or a Media Hub channel. Remember to press "Save configuration" when done.
zalo_routes_empty_2: Pick the source Zalo group and the destination Facebook Page / Google Business / Media Hub channel.
zalo_routes_empty_3: Go to the Facebook Tokens tab to grant Page tokens, then enable auto-publish if you want.
zalo_routes_label_ph: e.g. Kindergarten class → Việt Anh Page
zalo_routes_folder_hint: Group pages of the same person into one section — the Posts tab filters by it.
zalo_routes_group_hint: The group whose images are collected.
zalo_routes_hub_hint: Posts also become Media Hub drafts on the Calendar for this channel.
zalo_routes_gbp_hint: Profiles saved in the Google Business tab. Leave empty to skip Google.
zalo_routes_no_gbp: No Google Business profile saved yet — add them in the Google Business tab.
zalo_routes_curate_title: On: AI drops duplicate/blurry/dark images and picks the best ones. Off: keep every image.
zalo_routes_advanced_sub: timing · auto-comment · footer · writing guide · hashtags
zalo_routes_debounce_hint: After the group goes quiet this long, the batch closes and a draft is created.
zalo_routes_maxwait_hint: Hard cap — the batch always closes after this long even if images keep coming.
zalo_routes_comment_hint: Automatically commented right under each published post.
zalo_routes_footer_hint: Inserted verbatim at the end of every post (hotline, address, hashtags, Google Maps…).
zalo_routes_footer_ph: Paste the whole contact block here.
zalo_routes_guide_hint: AI follows these INSTRUCTIONS to adapt each post (tone, addressing, campaign, lead magnet) — not copied verbatim.
zalo_routes_hashtags: AI adds 5 hashtags at the end (below the footer)
zalo_routes_groups_loading: Loading group list… (first time can take 10–30s)
zalo_token_need_app: Enter the App ID or Secret first
zalo_token_clear_app_confirm: Delete the Facebook App configuration? App ID + Secret will be cleared. Page tokens are kept.
zalo_token_paste_first: Paste a Facebook user token first
zalo_token_delete_confirm: Remove Page "{{name}}" from the list and delete its token?
zalo_token_loading: Loading token status from the bot…
zalo_token_app_hint_edit: Open your app page → Settings → Basic to get the App ID + App Secret.
zalo_token_app_hint_locked: Configured and locked. Click "Change" to edit.
zalo_token_no_pages: No Pages yet — paste a user token below.
zalo_token_some_missing: Some Pages have no token — grant below.
zalo_token_some_expiring: Some tokens will expire — consider re-granting.
zalo_token_all_ok: All tokens are permanent — nothing to do.
zalo_token_user_ph: Paste the Facebook user token here…
zalo_token_refs_hint: List the Pages you manage & want to post to. Pages inside Business Manager MUST be listed here (user tokens cannot enumerate them). Get the ID: Page → About → Page ID.
zalo_token_page_refs: Pages to post to (ID or link — one per line)
zalo_token_guide: How to get a token — 4 steps
zalo_token_guide_1: Open Graph Explorer (button above) and pick YOUR app at the top right.
zalo_token_guide_2: Click Permissions → add: pages_show_list, pages_manage_posts, pages_read_engagement.
zalo_token_guide_3: Click "Generate Access Token", sign in if asked, then copy the token string.
zalo_token_guide_4: Paste it above → the system finds every Page you manage and grants permanent tokens.
zalo_gbp_browser_opened: Google login browser opened on the bot machine
zalo_gbp_session_uploaded: Session uploaded — Google Business is ready
zalo_gbp_session_hint: Google Business posts through a saved Google login (Playwright). Google does not publish exact expiry; the estimate below is based on session cookies.
zalo_gbp_starting: Opening browser… (10–15s, do not click again)
zalo_gbp_login_note: The login browser opens ON THE MACHINE RUNNING THE BOT. If the bot runs on a headless VPS, log in on a local machine (npm run gbp:login → data/gbp-session.json) and upload the file here:
zalo_gbp_profiles_hint: Save each name + Business/Profile ID once. The Groups → Pages tab then picks them from a dropdown. The ID is the long number in Google Business Advanced settings.
zalo_gbp_name_ph: Display name, e.g. Việt Anh School
zalo_gbp_no_profiles: No profiles yet. Click "Edit" to add your Google Business IDs.
zalo_settings_logout_wipe_confirm: Log out AND delete old account data (Groups → Pages config + pending posts)? Facebook tokens are kept.
zalo_settings_claude_bad_key: The key must start with sk-ant- — clear the field and paste the real key.
zalo_settings_ops_hint: Auto-publish vs review is set per channel in the Groups → Pages tab. Channels without auto-publish go to the Posts tab for review.
zalo_settings_pause_hint: Stop collecting new images from all groups.
zalo_settings_filter_hint: Using a personal account that exposes private groups? List the group IDs to SHOW (one per line) — pickers will only show those. Empty = show all. Groups already configured always show.
zalo_settings_account_note: Switching accounts happens immediately, no restart. Facebook tokens are ALWAYS kept — just map the new account’s groups to the old Pages to reconnect.
zalo_settings_claude_hint: The bot uses this key to write captions. It is auto-synced from Media Hub Settings; you can also set it manually here.
zalo_settings_clear_key_confirm: Delete the Claude API key? AI caption writing stops until a new key is set.
zalo_routes_page_no_token2: Page "{{name}}" has no usable token — reconnect it in Add Channel.
zalo_routes_empty_3b: Facebook Pages come from Add Channel (connect once) — then enable auto-publish here if you want.
zalo_routes_page_hint2: Don't see the Page? Connect it once in Add Channel — the bot picks up its token automatically.
zalo_routes_guide_ph:
Write DIRECTIONS for the AI, e.g.:
- Style: warm, emotional.
- Addressing: call readers 'ba mẹ', sign as 'nhà trường'.
- Running campaign: July tuition offer.
- Lead magnet: invite to leave a phone number for a tour.
Leave empty = default style.
zalo_settings_claude_moved: The Claude API key & model are managed in the main Settings and sync to the bot automatically.
anthropic_model_saved: Model saved — applies to AI writing, Agent and the Zalo bot
